user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Nespresso
Product type: Vertuo coffee machine
Tone: premium, modern, convenient
Visual style: Clean, sleek, and minimalist design with a focus on the machine's elegant curves and rich coffee colors.
Conceptual technique: lifestyle aspiration storytelling
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Clean, sleek, and minimalist design with a focus on the machine's elegant curves and rich coffee colors
brief.headline: Elevate Every Moment with Vertuo
brief.subheadline: Crafted for those who savor perfection — effortlessly.
brief.body_copy: Discover the art of coffee with the Nespresso Vertuo. Its elegant design complements your modern lifestyle, delivering rich, barista-quality coffee at the touch of a button. Indulge in convenience without compromising on taste or style.

visual_direction.setting: A bright, modern kitchen with minimalistic décor emphasizing clean lines and natural light.
visual_direction.focus: Close-up of the Vertuo machine highlighting its smooth, curved edges and glossy finish.
visual_direction.color_palette: Neutral tones with splashes of rich coffee browns and cream to evoke warmth.
visual_direction.composition: Machine positioned slightly off-center with a freshly brewed cup of coffee in the foreground, steam gently rising.
visual_direction.lighting: Soft, natural lighting to enhance the machine’s sleek surfaces and the coffee’s rich color.
visual_direction.lifestyle_element: A stylish individual or couple enjoying coffee, suggesting sophistication and ease.
visual_direction.branding: Subtle Nespresso logo placement in the corner to maintain minimalist aesthetic.
